tiktok.caption: Your brain literally can't feel your future self's pain — and that one glitch is why 56% of Americans have under $1,000 saved.

youtube_short.title: The Brain Glitch That Costs You $312,000
title_alternatives: Why Saving Feels Painful — The $312K Science
56% Have Under $1K Saved. Here's Exactly Why.
youtube_short.description: Scientists call it present bias — your brain literally cannot feel the pain of your future self. That's why 56% of Americans have less than $1,000 saved even though they know they should be saving more. Researchers proved it: to make your brain choose tomorrow over today, you'd need a 157% annual return. No investment on earth pays that. Delay investing by just five years in your twenties and you forfeit $312,000 in compound growth. The fix isn't willpower — it's automation. Set up automatic transfers so future-you gets paid before present-you can spend it. #personalfinance #presentbias #savingmoney #behavioralfinance #retirementplanning

hook_line: Your brain literally can't feel your future self's pain — $312K gone
